title: Mayor Walsh announces hiring events
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh announced two city hiring events to fill vacancies across city government. The Department of Water will host a specialized recruiting event on April 29 with on-the-spot job offers for watershed inspectors, water system construction engineers, and maintenance workers. A broader multi-department job fair follows on May 12, indicating organized workforce development efforts across city operations.

political_signal.description: Mayor-led announcement prioritizing workforce development and operational capacity in water department and broader city services, signaling commitment to filling critical infrastructure roles.

processing_notes: Author listed as Unknown in source metadata
Two distinct events with specific dates, times, and venues provided for operational planning
Department of Water is primary focus with expedited hiring process; secondary multi-department fair suggests broader staffing needs
No budget, contract, or financial data included in announcement
